channel.title: Twitter Timeline - All
channel.description: Auto-generated RSS feed: Twitter Timeline - All

item.title: Vincent Koc (@vincent_koc)
item.description: Openclawがプラグイン開発者向けに、必要な機能や課題、テスト方法に関するフィードバックを募集している。
item.content:encoded:
Vincent Koc @vincent_koc

Looking for input / feedback for anyone developing plugins or looking to develop plugins on @openclaw
- What hooks/features are you looking for?
- What is stopping you from plugins?
- Any key pain points?
- How do you test when developing?
DM's open or drop comments here :)

AI・テック

View on Twitter
